description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/davidjpeacock/kurly. Include a before_script that creates the GOPATH src directory for the repository, symlinks the project directory, changes into it, and runs go get ./... for all jobs. Define two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a format job that runs diff <(echo -n) <(gofmt -s -d .), then go vet on all non‑vendor packages, and finally go test -race on those packages. In the build stage add a compile job that executes bash $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/build.sh kurly $CI_PROJECT_DIR and stores the resulting files as artifacts in the artifacts/ directory.
